rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 4/10 and rest their reasoning entirely on job-relevant factors: dated and limited C++ experience, a predominantly web/Dlang tech focus, and the absence of industrial automation and IEC 62443 security expertise. The differences between the two are pure rewording of the same substance, with no concern, score shift, or reasoning keyed to the Berlin-to-Lagos location change. This is well within ordinary run-to-run variation.
